embed.title: 📌 Welcome to Los Santos State Roleplay!
embed.description: Hello **{username}**, welcome to our FiveM community!

fields.name: 📋 What is this number?
fields.value: Your badge number is a unique identifier that represents your membership in our community. It's used for server administration, support requests, and community recognition.

fields.name: 🔧 How it works
fields.value:
• Your number is automatically assigned when you join
• It appears in your nickname (e.g., "{badgeNumber} | YourUsername")
• This number stays with you as long as you're a member
• It's used for server management and support

fields.name: 💡 Important Notes
fields.value:
• Make sure you have your FiveM name set to **{badgeNumber} | {username}** to avoid any issues connecting.
• Use it when contacting staff for support
• It helps us identify you quickly in the community
• Your number is unique and cannot be changed
